title: The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou
actors: Bill Murray, Owen Wilson, Anjelica Huston
plot: With a plan to exact revenge on a legendary shark that killed his partner, oceanographer Steve Zissou (Bill Murray) rallies a crew that includes his estranged wife, a journalist, and a man who may or may not be his son.
language: English, Icelandic, Filipino, Portuguese, French, Tagalog, German, Italian
